repair_candidate.summary: Repair and finalize contributor PR #90885, which resolves bare compaction model aliases through the shared model-selection helpers before dispatch.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agent): resolve compaction model alias to canonical model ref
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repair and finalize the compaction model alias resolution fix from #90885
- preserve literal configured model id precedence, then resolve aliases through the shared model-selection helpers
- preserve @Pick-cat's source PR credit

Refs #90340
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90885
Clownfish cluster: live-pr-inventory-20260618T170451-014

## Test plan
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review
credit_notes: Preserve credit for @Pick-cat as the author of source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90885.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary, include Thanks @Pick-cat and source PR attribution in the PR body and changelog note.
